title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Orochi, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You sure you aren't after opening the borders?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And now that you've lost your screen to hide behind,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've got no choice but to come negotiate with me directly.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're panicking. And that means I can scalp ya for all you're worth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That being said, this is a pretty pickle indeed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look around you. The people seem quite happy, don't they?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If there was anything we desire, it'd only be more power.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The last time, we went with battleships,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But this time, we want Dr. vegapunk!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not asking you if it's possible or not.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Celestial dragons? The Marines? Know this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if all of you banded together, you'd never topple this country.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I have Kaido himself at my back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Not a care in the world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: chicken, raised in the beautiful orchi plantations

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We've brought in all the popular geishas!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yes, sir! We'll toss it all out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And for sashimi, we have tuna!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The sake is the Denver's best!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Without a care in the world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Комментар�: So you're here, too! I've been wanting to meet you!`]

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come, come! Next week is the fire festival!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Let this be the opening battle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who country shopping in KU R02I MI orochi

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Eat and drink your heart out!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 59 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
